A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (call_nfIucShkZsSqUw55UQatK5rM), the agent implemented the dollar-cost averaging by buying at each month’s first trading day and valuing positions at each index’s own last available date (g.iloc[-1]), producing inconsistent horizons and a different methodology than expected, which led to a mismatched top-5 ranking.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
